title: The Inter-State Corporations Act, 1957
full_text: The Inter-State Corporations Act, 1957 अन्‍तर्राज्‍यिक निगम अधिनियम,1957 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195738 Act Number: 38 Enactment Date: 1957-09-20 Act Year: 1957 Short Title: The Inter-State Corporations Act, 1957 Hindi Title: अन्‍तर्राज्‍यिक निगम अधिनियम,1957 Long Title: An Act to provide for the reorganisation of certain corporations functioning in two or more States by virtue of section 109 of the States Reorganisation Act, 1956, and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 20-09-1957 Last Updated: 08-04-2019 Schedule 1. Power of State Governments to frame schemes. Section 4. Reorganisation of certain inter-State corporations. Section 5. Power of Central Government to add to the Schedule. Schedule 1.
